final:
module zero_crossing_detector (
    input wire clk,
    input wire signal,
    output reg pulse
);
    reg signal_prev;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        signal_prev <= signal; // Default pulse output
        if ((signal_prev == 1 && signal == 0) || (signal_prev == 0 && signal == 1)) begin
            pulse <= 1; // Set pulse on zero crossing
        end
        pulse <= 0; // Store previous signal value
    end
endmodule

module edge_detector (
    input wire clk,
    input wire signal_in,
    output reg edge_detected
);
    reg signal_in_d;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        edge_detected <= signal_in && ~signal_in_d; // Delay the input signal by one clock cycle
        signal_in_d <= signal_in; // Detect rising edge
    end
endmodule

module pipeline_register (
    input clk,
    input [4:0] data_in,
    output reg [4:0] data_out
);
    reg [4:0] stage1;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        data_out <= stage1; // Stage 1: Register input
        stage1 <= data_in; // Stage 2: Pass to output
    end
endmodule

module adc_controller (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [15:0] adc_input,
    output reg [11:0] dac_output,
    output reg valid_output
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        valid_output <= 1'b1; // Take upper 12 bits
        dac_output <= adc_input[15:4]; // Indicate valid output
    end
endmodule

module zero_crossing_detector (
    input wire clk,
    input wire signal,
    output reg zero_cross
);
    reg previous_signal;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        previous_signal <= signal; // Default output
        if ((previous_signal == 1'b0 && signal == 1'b1) || (previous_signal == 1'b1 && signal == 1'b0)) begin
            zero_cross <= 1; // Zero crossing detected
        end
        zero_cross <= 0;
    end
endmodule

module edge_detector (
    input wire clk,
    input wire signal_in,
    output reg edge_out
);
    reg signal_in_prev;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        signal_in_prev <= signal_in; // Default output
        if (signal_in && !signal_in_prev) begin
            edge_out <= 1; // Rising edge detected
        end
        edge_out <= 0; // Store the previous state
    end
endmodule

module master_slave_d_latch (
    input wire D,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q,
    output reg Qn
);
    reg master_Q;

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        master_Q <= D; // Capture D on rising edge
    end

    always @(negedge CLK) begin
        Qn <= ~master_Q; // Output Q on falling edge
        Q <= master_Q; // Inverted output
    end
endmodule

module master_slave_d_latch (
    input wire D,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q,
    output reg Qn
);
    reg master_latch;

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        master_latch <= D; // Sample D when CLK is high
    end

    always @(negedge CLK) begin
        Qn <= ~master_latch; // Update Q when CLK goes low
        Q <= master_latch; // Update Qn
    end
endmodule

module top_module(
    input clk,
    input write_enable,
    input [1:0] write_address,
    input [15:0] write_data,
    input [1:0] read_address_1,
    input [1:0] read_address_2,
    output reg [15:0] read_data_1,
    output reg [15:0] read_data_2
);reg [15:0] registers [3:0];

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (write_enable) begin
        registers[write_address] <= write_data;
    end
    read_data_2 <= registers[read_address_2];
    read_data_1 <= registers[read_address_1];
end

endmodule

module top_module(

	input clk,
	input [31:0] instrIn,
	input [31:0] pcplus4,
	output reg [31:0] instrOut,
	output reg [31:0] pcplus_4
    );always @(posedge clk)
begin
 pcplus_4 <= pcplus4;
 instrOut <= instrIn;
end

endmodule

module top_module(input [4:0]Ra, 
					input [4:0]Rb, 
					input [4:0]Rw, 
					input [31:0]Bw,
					input clk,     
					input Regwr,   
					output reg [31:0]Ba,
					output reg [31:0]Bb,
					input reset);(* keep = "true" *)	reg [31:0]rf[0:31]; 

   integer i;
   always@(posedge clk, negedge reset) begin 
                          if (reset == 0) for (i=0; i<32; i=i+1) rf[i] <= 32'h0;
                          else if(Regwr == 1 && Rw != 0)  rf[Rw] <= Bw;         
                          end 


	always @(*) begin
	               Bb <= rf[Rb];
	               Ba <= rf[Ra];
	            end
	            

    
endmodule

module top_module(
	input clk,
	input data_en_in,
	input [15:0]data_in,
	output reg data_en,
	output reg [15:0]data_out
	);always @(posedge clk)
begin
	data_out <= data_in;
	data_en <= data_en_in;
end

endmodule

module top_module(
  input clk,
  input [3:0] a,
  input [3:0] b,
  output [7:0] result
);reg [7:0] product_reg;   // register to hold the product
  reg [3:0] a_reg;         // register to hold a
  reg [3:0] b_reg;         // register to hold b

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    b_reg <= b;
    a_reg <= a;
    product_reg <= a_reg * b_reg;   // multiply a and b and store in product_reg
  end

  assign result = product_reg;   // assign the product to the output

endmodule

module top_module(
  input trigger,
  input clk,         // Added clk input
  output reg pulse   // Changed pulse to reg type
);parameter pulse_width = 10; // pulse width in time units
  
  reg [7:0] count; // 8-bit counter to count up to pulse_width
  
  always @(posedge trigger) begin
    pulse <= 1; // reset counter on trigger
    count <= 0; // set pulse high on trigger
  end
  
  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (count < pulse_width) begin
      count <= count + 1; // increment counter
    end else begin
      pulse <= 0; // set pulse low after pulse_width
    end
  end
  
endmodule

module top_module( 
    input wire clk,
    input wire [15:0] in,
    output reg [7:0] out_hi,
    output reg [7:0] out_lo );always @(posedge clk) begin
        out_lo <= in[7:0];
        out_hi <= in[15:8];
    end

endmodule

module top_module(
    input Overflow,
    input [31:0]DataOut,
    input [31:0]Addr,
    input [4:0]Rw_in,
    input RegWr,
    input MemtoReg,
    input clk,
    output reg [31:0]DataIn,
    output reg WE,
    output reg [4:0]Rw
       );always@(negedge clk)
    begin
     Rw<=Rw_in;
    WE<=(~Overflow)&RegWr;
    if(MemtoReg)
    DataIn<=DataOut;
    else 
    DataIn<=Addr;
    end 
endmodule

module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,

    input MEM_RegWrite,
    input[4:0] MEM_WriteReg,
    input[1:0] MEM_RegSrc,
    input[31:0] MEM_aluResult,
    input[31:0] MEM_dmOut,
    input[31:0] MEM_PC,

    output reg WB_RegWrite,
    output reg[4:0] WB_WriteReg,
    output reg[1:0] WB_RegSrc,
    output reg[31:0] WB_aluResult,
    output reg[31:0] WB_dmOut,
    output reg[31:0] WB_PC
);always @(posedge clk) 
    begin
        WB_WriteReg <= rst ? 5'b0 : MEM_WriteReg;
        WB_RegWrite <= rst ? 1'b0 : MEM_RegWrite;
        WB_RegSrc <= rst ? 2'b0 : MEM_RegSrc;
        WB_aluResult <= rst ? 32'b0 : MEM_aluResult;
        WB_dmOut <= rst ? 32'b0 : MEM_dmOut;
        WB_PC <= rst ? 32'b0 : MEM_PC;
    end

endmodule

module top_module(
  input clk,
  input [addr_width-1:0] addr1,
  input [addr_width-1:0] addr2,
  input we1,
  input we2,
  input [width-1:0] din1,
  input [width-1:0] din2,
  output reg [width-1:0] dout1,
  output reg [width-1:0] dout2
);parameter depth = 256; // number of memory locations
parameter width = 8; // width of each memory location in bits
localparam addr_width = $clog2(depth); // calculate address width using $clog2

reg [width-1:0] mem [0:depth-1];

always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we1) begin
    mem[addr1] <= din1;
  end
  if (we2) begin
    mem[addr2] <= din2;
  end
  dout2 <= mem[addr2];
  dout1 <= mem[addr1];
end

endmodule

module top_module(input clk,
                  input             reset,

                  input [31:0]      ic_addr,
                  input             ic_rq,
                  output reg        ic_data_out_valid,
                  output reg [31:0] ic_data_out,

                  
                  input [31:0]      data_in, 
                  input             data_in_ready, 
                  output reg        data_rd, 
                  output reg [31:0] data_address 
                  );always @(posedge clk)
     begin
        data_rd <= ic_rq;
        data_address <= ic_addr;
        ic_data_out <= data_in;
        ic_data_out_valid <= data_in_ready;
     end

endmodule

module top_module(
    input clk,
    input in,
    output reg out
);

    reg in_d; // Delayed version of the input signal

    // Always block triggered on the rising edge of the clock
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        in_d <= in; // Detect the rising edge
        out <= in & ~in_d; // Update the delayed input signal
    end

endmodule

module top_module(
    input clk,
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    output reg [7:0] out,
    output reg out_valid
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        out_valid <= 1'b1;
        out <= a & b;
    end
    
endmodule

module top_module(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input [1:0] op,
    input clk,
    output reg [7:0] result,
    output reg valid
);reg [7:0] temp_result;

always @(posedge clk) begin
    case (op)
        2'b00: temp_result = a + b; // addition
        2'b01: temp_result = a - b; // subtraction
        2'b10: temp_result = a * b; // multiplication
        2'b11: temp_result = a / b; // division
    endcase
    valid <= 1;
    result <= temp_result;
end

endmodule

module top_module(
	input wire [31:0] instruction_fetch,
	input wire [31:0] PC_fetch,
	input wire clock,
	
	output reg [31:0] instruction_decode,
	output reg [31:0] PC_decode);always @(posedge clock) begin
		PC_decode <= PC_fetch;
		instruction_decode <= instruction_fetch;
	end
endmodule

module top_module(
        input [3:0] dataA_d,
        input [3:0] dataB_d,
        input [1:0] sum10,
        input clk,
        input reset_L_d,
        output reg [3:0] dataA_dd,
        output reg [3:0] dataB_dd,
        output reg [1:0] sum10_d,
        output reg [1:0] reset_L_dd
    );always @(posedge clk)begin
        dataB_dd <= dataB_d;
        dataA_dd <= dataA_d;
        sum10_d <= sum10;
        reset_L_dd <= reset_L_d;

    end
endmodule

module top_module(
    input clk,                // Added clk input
    input [31:0] op1,
    input [31:0] op2,
    output reg [31:0] result,
    output reg carry_out
);reg [31:0] sum;
reg carry;                 // Changed carry to single bit as it's used as carry out

always @(*) begin
    sum = op1 + op2;
    carry = (op1[31] & op2[31]) | ((op1[31] ^ op2[31]) & ~sum[31]); // Proper carry calculation
end

always @(posedge clk) begin
    carry_out <= carry;
    result <= sum;    // Use single bit carry
end

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [23:0] ZN,
    input [7:0] ZEN,
    input ZS,
	 input CLK,
    output reg [23:0] ZN1,
    output reg [7:0] ZEN1,
    output reg ZS1
    );always @(posedge CLK) begin
ZEN1<=ZEN;
ZN1<=ZN;
ZS1<=ZS;
end
endmodule

module MEMWB_Stage(
    input  clock,
    input  reset,
    input  M_Flush,
    input  M_Stall,
    input  WB_Stall,
    input  M_RegWrite,
    input  M_MemtoReg,
    input  [31:0] M_ReadData,
    input  [31:0] M_ALU_Result,
    input  [4:0]  M_RtRd,
    output reg WB_RegWrite,
    output reg WB_MemtoReg,
    output reg [31:0] WB_ReadData,
    output reg [31:0] WB_ALU_Result,
    output reg [4:0]  WB_RtRd
    );
    always @(posedge clock) begin
        WB_MemtoReg   <= (reset) ? 0     : ((WB_Stall) ? WB_MemtoReg                              : M_MemtoReg);
        WB_RegWrite   <= (reset) ? 0     : ((WB_Stall) ? WB_RegWrite   : ((M_Stall | M_Flush) ? 0 : M_RegWrite));
        WB_ReadData   <= (reset) ? 32'b0 : ((WB_Stall) ? WB_ReadData                              : M_ReadData);
        WB_ALU_Result <= (reset) ? 32'b0 : ((WB_Stall) ? WB_ALU_Result                            : M_ALU_Result);
        WB_RtRd       <= (reset) ? 5'b0  : ((WB_Stall) ? WB_RtRd                                  : M_RtRd);
    end
endmodule
